**Does it respect the cardinal rule?**
> No model's *opinion* may decide anything — only executed artifacts or frozen rules may decide.

Explain how your proposal keeps the verdict grounded in executed verification / frozen rules and does not reintroduce a free-form LLM judge. (PRs that let a model "just decide" won't be merged — route uncertainty to the honest-abstention path instead.)

**Alternatives considered**
